output.cypher: MATCH (i:Issue)-[:INVOLVES_COMPONENT]->(c:Component) MATCH (cause:Cause)-[:CAUSES]->(p:Phenomenon) WHERE c.canonical_name = '液压泵' AND p.canonical_name CONTAINS '泄漏' OPTIONAL MATCH (doc:Document)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Chunk)-[:MENTIONS]->(cause) RETURN cause.canonical_name AS cause_name, collect(DISTINCT doc.document_id) AS source_doc_ids

MATCH (doc:Document)-[:CONTAINS]->(chunk:Chunk)-[:MENTIONS]->(cause:Cause) WHERE cause.canonical_name CONTAINS '压力不足' RETURN doc.document_id AS source_doc_id, chunk.chunk_id AS chunk_id, chunk.page_no AS page_no
